payload.answer: Recall filtered mem_old because it is marked as superseded by mem_new. The system preserves only current facts and excludes deleted or superseded records to maintain accuracy and prevent stale information from being presented.
citations: durable_memory_protocol: never present superseded facts as current
payload.decision: mem_new retained, mem_old filtered due to supersession

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new contains more recent or authoritative information; mem_old marked as superseded per durable memory protocol

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering decision for Sam from Goldman

memory_cards.statement: mem_new represents current information about Sam from Goldman
mem_old is superseded by mem_new and filtered from recall results

details: Filtering decision complies with durable memory constraints

repair_options: Verify mem_new accuracy before relying on recall result
Audit supersession chain if mem_old should remain active
Check timestamp and source authority of both records
